title: OPERATION SAUCER #8 [Operação Prato]  reports n.071 to n.080 [1977]

text_preview:
- 01. REG. n. 071

- 02. LOCATION: Baía do Sol, Mosqueiro-PA

- 03. DATE / TIME: 13 Dec 77 – at 2 3:55 am

- 04. DESCRIPTION: Luminous body

- 05. COLOR: Reddish yellow

- 06. SHAPE: Undefined

- 07. APPARENT SIZE: 5 cm

- 08. MOVEMENT: Straight trajectory, in the Northwest / Southeast Direction

- 09. SPEED: Average (over 300 km / h)

- 10. ALTITUDE: 2,000m (estimated)

- 11. DISTANCE: 4,000 m (estimated)

- 12. OBSERVER (S): 1S Q AT MT Flávio and the civilians Ubiratan Pinon FRIAS and Ms. F.M. FREITAS COSTA.

- 13. NOTE: Passage over Colares Island (Jejutaua).

- 14. APPENDIX: Copy of a phot
location: Mosqueiro / Ananindeua / São Domingos do Capim, Pará
summary: Operação Prato reports 071–080: ten luminous-body sightings Dec 1977 in Pará; report 076 describes close circular object at 100 m distance photographed 26 times rotating and undulating near São Domingos do Capim.
